Container.Name: MarketPlaceLens
Container.Overview: MarketPlaceLens is a self-hosted Kleinanzeigen and marketplace watcher with recurring search jobs, review queues, watchlists, and optional AI-assisted buyer workflows.
Container.Description: MarketPlaceLens runs recurring marketplace search jobs, collects matching listings, and gives you a local dashboard to review, hide, save, contact, and watch interesting items. It supports Kleinanzeigen-focused workflows, watchlists, notifications, and optional AI-assisted inquiry text and listing assessment features.
Container.Requires: MarketPlaceLens is intended for private self-hosted use with marketplace URLs you are allowed to access. It does not bypass logins, CAPTCHA, bot protection, private APIs, rate limits, or platform access controls.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent MarketPlaceLens data, including SQLite database, settings, users, watchlists, notifications, and session secret.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the MarketPlaceLens Web UI.

Config.Name: Poll Enabled
Config.Description: Enable recurring background polling for active marketplace jobs.

Config.Name: Default Poll Minutes
Config.Description: Default polling interval for new marketplace jobs, in minutes.

Config.Name: Minimum Poll Minutes
Config.Description: Minimum allowed polling interval for marketplace jobs, in minutes.

Config.Name: User Agent
Config.Description: HTTP User-Agent used by marketplace fetchers.

Config.Name: Admin Username
Config.Description: Optional bootstrap admin username. Used only when an admin password is supplied before first startup.

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Optional bootstrap admin password for unattended first startup. Leave empty to use the guided Web UI setup.

Config.Name: Session Secret
Config.Description: Optional fixed session secret for restores or migrations. Leave empty for normal first startup; MarketPlaceLens will generate and persist one in appdata.

Config.Name: Telegram Bot Token
Config.Description: Optional Telegram bot token for listing notifications. Can also be configured later in the UI.

Config.Name: Telegram Chat ID
Config.Description: Optional Telegram chat ID for listing notifications. Can also be configured later in the UI.

Config.Name: Webhook URL
Config.Description: Optional webhook URL for listing notifications. Can also be configured later in the UI.
